name: Low income - below basic allowance (HK$100,000)
description: Income below basic allowance results in zero tax. MPF at 5% applies since above HK$85,200 threshold.

sources.description: Manual calculation: MPF = 100000 * 5% = 5000. Net income = 95000. NCI = 95000 - 132000 = 0. Progressive tax = 0. Standard rate = 95000 * 15% = 14250. Tax = min(0, 14250) = 0.
